series_metadata.series_description: On a daily basis, Trustees that hold securities pledged by the Ohio Pooled Collateral System banks send a statement to the Treasurer that details the inventory of all securities held by that Trustee for the benefit of the Treasurer. These statements are then reconciled against a report that lists the Treasurer''s inventory of securities pledged to collateralize public deposits. Results of this reconciliation are recorded on a summary report.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
